3012830.name: Dark Card
3012830.description:
Dark Card is a 2D top-down survival horror game, where you play cards to perform all actions, from attacking to unlocking doors. Collect cards and experiment with them while exploring the world around you. The story of Dark Card has you playing as a young boy who falls down a wish-granting well. Find a way out of the well without becoming the next victim of the horrors below.



Features:

13 different cards to collect and experiment with.

limb dismemberment system.

plenty of secrets to unlock and discover.

Death mini games that hold their own special secrets.

Permadeath.

An open well that is explorable top to bottom from the start of the game.
